"'''Wind Raiders of Taloraan'''" is a roleplaying adventure published in [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 5|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 5]], written by [[James L. Cambias]]. It introduced, among other things, the planet [[Taloraan/Legends|Taloraan]] into [[Canon|continuity]], which would later appear in the [[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron (video game)|Rogue Squadron video game]].
